description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a hidden .review-docs job that uses the ruby:2.6-alpine image, runs before_script steps `apk add --update openssl`, `wget $CI_PROJECT_URL/raw/$CI_COMMIT_SHA/scripts/trigger-build-docs`, `chmod 755 trigger-build-docs`, `gem install gitlab --no-document`, sets GIT_STRATEGY to none, defines a review environment named `review-docs/$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG` with stop job `review-docs-cleanup`, URL using `$DOCS_REVIEW_APPS_DOMAIN` and `$DOCS_GITLAB_REPO_SUFFIX`, and only runs on merge_requests when `$CI_SERVER_HOST == "gitlab.com"` and `$CI_PROJECT_NAMESPACE == "gitlab-org"`. Add a `docs lint` job in the test stage that uses the `registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/gitlab-build-images:gitlab-docs-lint` image, runs the script commands `scripts/lint-doc.sh`, `markdownlint --config .markdownlint.json 'doc/**/*.md'`, `mv doc/ /tmp/gitlab-docs/content/$DOCS_GITLAB_REPO_SUFFIX`, `cd /tmp/gitlab-docs`, `bundle exec nanoc`, `bundle exec nanoc check internal_links`, and `bundle exec nanoc check internal_anchors`. Add a `review-docs-deploy` job that extends `.review-docs`, runs in the review stage, executes `./trigger-build-docs deploy`, and is triggered manually. Add a `review-docs-cleanup` job that also extends `.review-docs`, runs in the review stage, executes `./trigger-build-docs cleanup`, is manual, and stops the review environment. Ensure all jobs inherit default tags, retry policies, and the `.only-docs-changes` rule from the shared includes.
